No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN MOORE's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class And Representative Action Settlement And Provisional Class Certification For Settlement Purposes Only

Deny without prejudice. (see word minutes for full details)

All hearings will be in Department 611 before Judge Karnow.

Paper courtesy copies of all papers filed in this case which relate to settlement or dismissal must, on the date of filing, be provided to Department 611."

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.
